flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at West Liberty University fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (92.7% → 68.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at West Liberty University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at West Liberty University rose 41% between 2021 and 2024 (42.3% → 59.5%).
